title: The Duel of Elbaf Warriors
description: On pages 8–11, the duel of elbaf warriors as luffy and the crew meet Dorry and Brogy, two giant warriors locked in a century-long duel on Little Garden.
scene: The Duel of Elbaf Warriors. Luffy and the crew meet Dorry and Brogy, two giant warriors locked in a century-long duel on Little Garden. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I see...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I guess that explains why you refused.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: A country in the middle of a civil strife wouldn't have any money to spare.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So who is this boss dude anyways?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You mean the boss' true identity!? Please don't ask me! In fact, you're better off not knowing!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: If you knew, Baroque works would come and hunt you down...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hahaha. Yeah, just leave us out of it.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I mean, a guy who's planning to take over an entire country must be one incredibly dangerous person!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yes, exactly. No matter how strong you pirates may be,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: You'd be no match for crocodile, a member of the ouka Shichibukai!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Didn't you just say his name...?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: What was that bird and otter just now!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A Shichibukai, she said! Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I'm sorry I'm sorry!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Heh, not bad.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Did they go to report that you've told us the boss' secret!? Well!? What's gonna happen to us now!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: I... I'm really sorry! It just accident-Tally slipped out!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: You think saying it ACCIDENTALLY makes this any better!? Why do we have to become hunted down because of a single slip-up from you!?

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: We just barely entered Grand Line and Already we have a Shichibuki Chasing After Us...!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Yeah, we're real lucky to be able to meet him so early.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I wonder what kind of guy he is?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Shut up, you two!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: It's been a real short time travelling with you but bye!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Where're ya going, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: They don't know my face yet so I'm running away!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: scratch

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: show

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Wow, you're good!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Now I can't even run away!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: S-Sorry...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Interesting bunch, those animals.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Where were you even planning to run away to?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In any case, with this,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: All 3 of us are now on Baroque works' hit list...

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: This is so cool!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Representation accepted in

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I... I have 500,000 in my savings account that you can have though...

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Fear not!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on the duel of elbaf warriors. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
